commands.name: command1
commands.description: A test command that prints a greeting on the glasses.
commands.trigger: When the user asks to run command 1, cmd 1, the first command, or a test command.

commands.name: take_photo
commands.description: Takes a photo with the glasses camera and saves it to the server.
commands.trigger: When the user asks to take a photo, take a picture, snap a pic, or save an image.

commands.name: describe_scene
commands.description: Takes a photo and speaks a description of what is in front of the user.
commands.trigger: When the user asks what's in front of them, what do you see, describe the scene, what am I looking at, where am I, or anything about their surroundings.

commands.name: read_text
commands.description: Takes a photo and reads aloud any text in it (books, signs, labels, screens, documents).
commands.trigger: When the user asks to read something to them: read this, what does this say, read the page, read the sign, read the label, what's written here, or similar.

commands.name: start_task
commands.description: Starts a guided, step-by-step walkthrough of a multistep physical task, speaking one step at a time and waiting for the user to say they're done before continuing.
commands.trigger: When the user asks for help doing a multistep real-world task, e.g. 'help me cook an egg', 'help me organize my bookshelf', 'walk me through making coffee', 'how do I set up this lamp', or anything phrased as wanting guided step-by-step help.

commands.name: volume_up
commands.description: Increases the glasses' speaker volume by one step and remembers it for next time.
commands.trigger: When the user asks to turn the volume up, speak louder, increase the volume, or similar.

commands.name: volume_down
commands.description: Decreases the glasses' speaker volume by one step and remembers it for next time.
commands.trigger: When the user asks to turn the volume down, speak quieter/softer, lower the volume, or similar.

commands.name: volume_max
commands.description: Sets the glasses' speaker volume to the maximum and remembers it for next time.
commands.trigger: When the user asks for max/maximum/full volume, the loudest it can go, or 'as high as it goes'.

commands.name: volume_min
commands.description: Sets the glasses' speaker volume to the minimum and remembers it for next time.
commands.trigger: When the user asks for min/minimum volume, to mute it, or 'as low as it goes'.

commands.name: speed_up
commands.description: Makes the spoken responses talk faster and remembers it for next time.
commands.trigger: When the user asks to talk faster, speed up, hurry up the speech, or similar.

commands.name: speed_down
commands.description: Makes the spoken responses talk slower and remembers it for next time.
commands.trigger: When the user asks to talk slower, slow down the speech, or similar.

commands.name: walk_interval_3
commands.description: Sets walking mode's narration interval to every 3 seconds.
commands.trigger: When the user asks to check every 3 seconds, or set the walking interval to 3 seconds.

commands.name: walk_interval_5
commands.description: Sets walking mode's narration interval to every 5 seconds.
commands.trigger: When the user asks to check every 5 seconds, or set the walking interval to 5 seconds.

commands.name: walk_interval_ondemand
commands.description: Sets walking mode to only narrate when something meaningfully changes, instead of on a fixed timer.
commands.trigger: When the user asks for walking mode to only speak when needed, on demand, or as needed.
